creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 22 Mar 2000 eddart@ca.sandia.gov wrote:

> When attempting to transfer a file larger than 2Gigs with scp from the
> openssh port, the connection drops -- sometimes immediately, sometimes
> after a significant amount of data has been transferred.

This type of bug report would be better directed to the OpenSSH developers
- but there's a chance it has been fixed recently in their code (they've
made a bunch of signedness and typedness fixes, etc.). We probably should
update to the latest sources (both the port and the base system copies)

Kris

----
In God we Trust -- all others must submit an X.509 certificate.
    -- Charles Forsythe <forsythe@alum.mit.edu>
